description: Generate a Jenkins Pipeline Groovy script using the Snippet Generator for a Git checkout of the Spring Boot repository (https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-boot.git) on branch '2.7.x'. The configuration must include cleaning before checkout, pruning stale remote-tracking branches, and checking out to the 'sources' sub-directory. Save the generated script to /home/ga/spring_checkout_snippet.groovy. You are logged in as admin (User: admin, Pass: Admin123!).
